source_rationale: ADIPOQ (adiponectin) is a canonical adipocyte-secreted hormone and definitive marker of mature adipocytes
PLIN1 (perilipin-1) coats lipid droplets in adipocytes and is a hallmark of mature white adipocytes

Glycerol-3-phosphate acyltransferase is essential for triglyceride synthesis in adipocytes

SORBS1 is involved in insulin signaling in adipocytes and is a marker of mature fat cells
CXCL14 is a chemokine highly expressed by fibroblasts, particularly in adipose tissue stroma

CXCL12/SDF-1 is a key chemokine produced by stromal/fibroblast populations
IGF1 is produced by mesenchymal/stromal cells and supports paracrine signaling in adipose tissue
